name: KPa-BM Holdings Limited
summary: KPa-BM Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides structural engineering works with a focus on design and build projects to the private and public sectors primarily in Hong Kong, Macau, and the People's Republic of China. The company operates in three segments: Structural Engineering Works, Supply and Installation of Building Material Products, and Trading of Building Material Products. It is also involved in the design, supply, trading, and installation of building material products; and property investment and trademark holding related activities. In addition, the company offers fabrication drawing and management services. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Tsuen Wan, Hong Kong. KPa-BM Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Success Wing Investments Limited.
